prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the Planning Inspectorate's spending in relation to services provided to HM Government, which applies to England. The Planning Inspectorate operates primarily in England, and the referenced regulations and decisions are specific to English law and governance, thus not applicable to Scotland.
